message.content:
Read and parse the XG5000 project file "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\_1c.xgwx" to extract all I/O variable names and descriptions.

This is an XML-based file. Search for:
1. All input variables (_00_IN00 ~ _04_IN31) with their Korean descriptions/comments
2. All output variables (_00_OUT00 ~ _08_OUT31) with their Korean descriptions/comments
3. Any variable definitions with P-addresses (P00000~P00400)

The file might be large, so:
- First check if it's plain XML or compressed (try reading first 200 bytes)
- If XML, search for variable definition sections using grep for patterns like "IN00", "OUT00", "_00_", "_01_", "설명" etc.
- Extract the complete list of I/O pin names with their slot, pin number, and Korean description

Output format should be organized by slot:
```
Slot 0 Input (_00_INxx):
  _00_IN00: [description]
  _00_IN01: [description]
  ...
Slot 0 Output (_00_OUTxx):
  _00_OUT00: [description]
  ...
```

Save the complete extracted I/O list to: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\IO_NAME_LIST.md

powershell -Command "
$path = 'C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\_1c.xgwx'
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($path)
Write-Host 'File size:' $bytes.Length 'bytes'
Write-Host 'First 8 bytes (hex):' ($bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') } | Join-String -Separator ' ')
$header = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($bytes[0..100])
Write-Host 'First 100 chars:' $header
"

content.text: 헤더가 `XG WORKSPACE FILE`(UTF-16LE)로 확인됩니다. XG5000 전용 바이너리 포맷이며 zlib 압축은 없습니다. 파일 전체를 UTF-16LE로 읽어서 텍스트 패턴을 검색하겠습니다.

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($dst)

# 파일 전체를 UTF-16LE 텍스트로 변환 후 검색
$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($bytes)
Write-Host "Total chars in Unicode decode: $($text.Length)"

# 텍스트 내 키워드 검색
$keywords = @('IN0', 'OUT0', '_00_', '_01_', '_02_', 'P0000', 'VAR', 'Symbol', 'Comment', 'Desc')
foreach ($kw in $keywords) {
    $idx = $text.IndexOf($kw)
    if ($idx -ge 0) {
        $sample = $text.Substring([Math]::Max(0, $idx-20), [Math]::Min(100, $text.Length - $idx + 20))
        Write-Host "Found '$kw' at $idx`: $sample"
        Write-Host "---"
    }
}
EOF

powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
# 파일 크기 재확인 및 직접 스트림 읽기
$fi = Get-Item $dst
Write-Host "File size: $($fi.Length)"

$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes($fi.Length)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()
Write-Host "Read bytes: $($bytes.Length)"

# UTF-16LE 텍스트로 변환 (BOM 건너뛰기)
# 첫 번째 유효 텍스트 위치 찾기
for ($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i += 2) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -ge 0x20 -and $bytes[$i] -le 0x7E -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x00) {
        Write-Host "UTF-16LE text starts around offset $i"
        break
    }
}

$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($bytes)
Write-Host "Text length: $($text.Length)"
Write-Host "Sample (chars 0-100):"
Write-Host $text.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(200, $text.Length))
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# XG5000 워크스페이스 파일 구조 파악: 청크 단위로 분석
# 헤더 이후 오프셋 60 부근부터 데이터 섹션 확인
Write-Host "=== Bytes 56-128 ==="
for ($i = 56; $i -lt 128; $i += 8) {
    $end = [Math]::Min($i+7, $bytes.Length-1)
    $hex = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
    Write-Host "  [$i] $hex"
}

# 16진수 전체 덤프를 파일로 저장
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i += 16) {
    $end = [Math]::Min($i+15, $bytes.Length-1)
    $hex = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
    $ascii = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { 
        if ($_ -ge 0x20 -and $_ -le 0x7E) { [char]$_ } else { '.' } 
    }) -join ''
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("$($i.ToString('X6')): $($hex.PadRight(48))  $ascii")
}
$sb.ToString() | Out-File 'C:\Temp\hex_dump.txt' -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host "Hex dump saved to C:\Temp\hex_dump.txt"
EOF

$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# 오프셋 64: 22 7A 1D 00 = 0x001D7A22 = 1,931,810 (다음 섹션 오프셋?)
# 큰 값 -> 아마 다음 섹션의 파일 포인터
# 실제 데이터 시작점 찾기: 첫 번째 비-null 데이터 블록
Write-Host "=== Scanning for non-null data blocks after offset 64 ==="
$i = 64
while ($i -lt $bytes.Length) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -ne 0x00) {
        $end = [Math]::Min($i+31, $bytes.Length-1)
        $hex = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
        Write-Host "  Non-null at [$i]: $hex"
        # 이 위치가 새 섹션 시작인지 확인
        # 다음 null 블록 찾기
        $j = $i
        while ($j -lt $bytes.Length -and $bytes[$j] -ne 0x00) { $j++ }
        Write-Host "  Block ends at $j (length $($j-$i))"
        $i = $j
    } else {
        $i++
    }
    if ($i -gt 500) { break }
}
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# 오프셋 64: 22 7A 1D 00 - little endian int32 = ?
$val64 = [System.BitConverter]::ToInt32($bytes, 64)
Write-Host "Value at offset 64: $val64 (0x$($val64.ToString('X8')))"

# XG5000 xgwx는 구조화된 바이너리 포맷
# IFF-like chunk 구조 가능성: chunk_type(4) + chunk_size(4) + data
# 헤더 이후 첫 번째 실제 데이터 청크 위치 계산
# 헤더가 58 47 00 04 02 00 FF FE FF 15 = 10바이트
# 다음 4바이트: 00 47 00 35... -> UTF-16 "XG5000" 문자열
# 문자열 끝 파악
Write-Host "`n=== Looking for structure after the title string ==="
# UTF-16 NULL 종결자 찾기 (00 00)
for ($i = 8; $i -lt 200; $i += 2) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -eq 0x00 -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x00) {
        Write-Host "Double-null (string end?) at offset $i"
        # 다음 non-null 청크
        $j = $i + 2
        while ($j -lt 200 -and $bytes[$j] -eq 0x00) { $j++ }
        if ($j -lt 200) {
            $hex = ($bytes[$j..([Math]::Min($j+15, $bytes.Length-1))] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
            Write-Host "  Next data at $j`: $hex"
        }
    }
}
EOF

    parts = []
